sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(6));
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, timestamp('2023-01-01'));
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (2, timestamp('2023-06-15 08:00:00', '01:30:00'));
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = timestamp('2023-12-31', '23:59:59.999') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, timestamp(event_time, '00:10:00') as updated_time FROM test_timestamps;
